text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Palmer... I need your help. It's my mom, she's
just... Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What happened? Go ahead and tell me
everything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I think that was everyone who had
something they wanted to talk to me about.
Finally time to get my chow on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, are you for real?! Lunchtime is over
already?! Nooo!
